title: podman-systemd.unit.5: adjust example options
body:
Use the reserved domain name example.com in the examples. For details, see RFC 2606
https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc2606#section-3

Modify PublishPort examples to make them reflect more common scenarios.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/23954
